description: Amiga file virus signatures -- viruses that infect executable hunk files

signatures.name: IRQ

patterns.description: JSR _LVOSetFunction(A6) + MOVE.L D0 + JSR _LVO -- OldOpenLibrary hook chain

signatures.description: IRQ file virus. Hooks OldOpenLibrary via SetFunction to infect executables when they are loaded. Prepends a new HUNK_CODE to infected files.

signatures.name: BGS9

patterns.description: Obfuscated filename with high-bit-set characters + space
ASCII 'TTV1' -- task name used by virus process

signatures.description: BGS9 file virus. Creates a task named 'TTV1' and uses obfuscated filenames ($A0A0A0 space). Links itself to executables.

signatures.name: HNY96

patterns.description: Partial ASCII marker ($65772059) -- part of 'New Year' message

signatures.description: HNY96 (Happy New Year 1996) file virus. Infects executables and displays a New Year message. Uses Filepart for path handling.

signatures.name: HNY97

patterns.description: ASCII 'NOOP ' -- NOP sled marker in HNY97 variant

signatures.description: HNY97 (Happy New Year 1997) file virus. Variant of HNY96 with updated date trigger and slightly different infection routine.

signatures.name: DASA
signatures.description: DASA file virus. Infects executables by prepending a virus hunk. Accesses ExecBase directly for system calls.

signatures.name: Xeno
signatures.description: Xeno file virus. Installs itself as a resident module using RTC_MATCHWORD. Infects executables loaded from disk.
